MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-10-2020 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE CURRENT TRIAL DATE. DANIEL MARSH, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. BRETT SCHWEINBERG, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS VIA COURTCALL. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1332(C)(2). THE COURT VACATES THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/21/20 AND SETS A TRIAL DATE OF 2/16/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR SANCTION IS DENIED AND MOTION TO RE-OPEN DISCOVERY IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES ARE GOVERNED BY THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE OF 9/21/20. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
